name: OpenClaw CLI
purpose: Expose OpenClaw as a supervised external-agent CLI, not as an autonomous gateway by default.

inputs.name: operator_command
inputs.description: Human-approved command such as version, status, doctor or a gated gateway operation.

inputs.name: manifest
inputs.description: Required browser/channel/tool manifest before any gateway, channel or agent action.

outputs.name: diagnostic_result
outputs.description: Version, status, doctor output or gated execution result.

outputs.name: witness
outputs.description: Brain OS witness event for every OpenClaw decision.

risk.notes: OpenClaw can run an always-on gateway and agent actions. CLI health checks are allowed; gateway, channels, plugins and external model calls require approval.

cost.budget_hint: Prefer local Ollama or explicit approved provider. GPT/Claude/DeepSeek calls require cost gate.

recovery.on_hold: collect missing manifest, auth and loopback evidence
recovery.on_degrade: use read-only CLI checks or local Ollama-only mode
recovery.on_failure: stop gateway if running, preserve logs, keep port 18789 closed until review
